location.name: Sofia
location.notes: Urban microclimates vary strongly. Balconies, south-facing slopes, concrete heat storage, wind exposure, and soil moisture can shift plant timing by weeks.

local_modifiers.description: Southeast balcony with morning and early afternoon sun.
local_modifiers.expected_effect: Earlier warming, but possible afternoon light limitation.

local_modifiers.description: Open field / meadow terrain with wind and variable soil.
local_modifiers.expected_effect: Higher temperature swings, higher drying, later spring start.

local_modifiers.description: Unheated small greenhouse or plastic cover.
local_modifiers.expected_effect: Faster spring start, higher heat stress risk in summer.
